Flow.description: - Workflow for when Assembly Eligible event is created or updated - Record the person who clicked TSLV/CSLV Certify Check Box

formulas.name: EventNameFormulaDate
formulas.expression: IF(AND(OR(ISNULL($Record.leaseworks__Projected_Event__c),ISBLANK($Record.leaseworks__Projected_Event__c)),OR(ISNULL($Record.leaseworks__Custom_PE_Record_Number__c),ISBLANK($Record.leaseworks__Custom_PE_Record_Number__c))), IF(CONTAINS($Record.Name,'<System Generated>'),TEXT($Record.leaseworks__Event_Type__c),$Record.Name) , IF( AND(OR(ISNULL($Record.leaseworks__Projected_Event__c),ISBLANK($Record.leaseworks__Projected_Event__c)), OR(ISNULL($Record.leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Maintenance_Program_Event__c),ISBLANK($Record.leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Maintenance_Program_Event__c))), IF( OR(ISNULL($Record.leaseworks__Custom_PE_Record_Number__c),ISBLANK($Record.leaseworks__Custom_PE_Record_Number__c)) , '' , 'Custom Event(' & TEXT($Record.leaseworks__Custom_PE_Record_Number__c) & ')' ), IF( OR(ISNULL($Record.leaseworks__Custom_PE_Record_Number__c),ISBLANK($Record.leaseworks__Custom_PE_Record_Number__c)) , $Record.leaseworks__Projected_Event__r.leaseworks__Event_Type__c , 'Custom Event(' & TEXT($Record.leaseworks__Custom_PE_Record_Number__c) & ')' ) ) & '-' & TEXT($Record.leaseworks__End_Date__c)&"-"&$Record.leaseworks__Constituent_Assembly__r.leaseworks__Serial_Number__c )

Flow.interviewLabel: Constt Assembly Eligible Event Created Updated {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Constt Assembly Eligible Event Created Updated

recordUpdates.name: Event_Name_and_correction_date_update
recordUpdates.label: Event name and correction date update
